title: ChargePoint and Eaton Establish Industry-First EV Charging Partnership
content: ChargePoint, a leading provider of EV charging solutions, and intelligent power management company Eaton, announced a collaboration to accelerate and simplify the deployment of EV charging infrastructure in the U.S., Canada and Europe. The companies will integrate EV charging and infrastructure solutions, co-developing new technologies to advance bidirectional power flow and vehicle-to-everything (V2X) capabilitiesâ€”enabling EVs to act as a power source for homes, buildings and more.
author: Analysts Account
